authors: ITDX YODY — HOD: Tăng Duy Phương
$metadata.scope: Enterprise Architecture Portal — strategic communication layer ITDX↔Ban lãnh đạo

usage.design: Import vào Figma qua Tokens Studio / Variables plugin (JSON format DTCG)
usage.dev: Process bằng Style Dictionary → CSS custom properties / Tailwind config / JS constants
usage.direct: Dùng trực tiếp: CSS var names = --{group}-{token} (e.g. --color-bg, --color-accent)

modes.light: Editorial — warm off-white background, dark text, gold accent
modes.dark: Default portal mode — deep navy background, warm text, bright gold accent

$notes.source: Extracted từ: (1) rendered CSS /page_intro/styles.css — actual hex values; (2) design system docs 00–10; (3) live portal https://yody-itdx-ea.vercel.app/
$notes.primitive-vs-semantic: Dùng primitive tokens để build, semantic tokens để apply. Không hardcode primitive vào component.
$notes.bilingual-convention: Tiếng Việt cho narrative content, English cho technical terms. Platform names, badge labels luôn ALL-CAPS English.
$notes.dark-first: Portal là dark-first. Light mode là editorial mode cho documents/export.

color.$description: 2-layer color system: primitive palette → semantic tokens → component tokens

primitive.$description: Raw palette — không dùng trực tiếp trong component. Dùng để compose semantic tokens.

300.$description: Light gold — hover states dark mode

600.$description: Light navy — dark mode surface elevated

900.$description: Rich dark brown-black — text light mode

light.$description: Forest green — LIVE status light mode

dark.$description: Lime green — LIVE status dark mode

semantic.$description: Semantic tokens — apply these in components. Two modes: light & dark.

border.$description: Subtle border on dark — warm tint 8%

border-bright.$description: Visible border on dark — warm tint 14%

status.$description: LIVE · DEV · PLAN · GAP system — operational status của từng product/capability. Nhất quán cross-portal.

implementation.$description: BUILD · BUY · HYBRID — implementation method tags. Phản ánh strategic posture.

$extensions.label: BUILD
$extensions.strategy: Core competitive capability — PLM, OMS, CDP, Loyalty

$extensions.label: ◇ VENDOR
$extensions.strategy: External system, tracked but not owned

health.$description: DMI / domain health percentage thresholds — trang /health

node.$description: Graph/diagram node colors — ATLAS data flow, org chart

typography.$description: Type system — bilingual Vi/EN, serif editorial body + monospace technical

body.$description: Body / prose / headings — editorial serif. Load từ Google Fonts: family=Crimson+Pro:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400

mono.$description: Technical labels, TOC, code, badge text. Load: family=Noto+Sans+Mono:wght@400;500;600

font-size.$description: Scale based on 16px base. Step ratio ≈1.125 (major second) với display jumps.

5xl.$description: H1 hero / KPI display number — desktop

bold.$description: H1/H2, KPI numbers, callout titles, strong

heading.$description: Heading composite tokens — map to Tailwind prose levels

display.$description: Hero H1 — page titles, KPI hero number

h2.$description: H2 section headers — claim + evidence pattern

chapter-label.$description: Chapter breadcrumb: 'Chương 02 · Bức tranh — Value Stream & Platforms'

roman-numeral.$description: Decorative section divider — I, II, III, IV, V, VI

lead.$description: Lead paragraph after H1/H2 — first para heavier read

special-chars.$description: Ký tự đặc biệt nhất quán xuyên suốt portal

separator-mid.$description: Middle dot U+00B7 — inline separator, title divider

separator-em.$description: Em dash U+2014 — chapter theme/title separator

warning.$description: U+26A0 — GAP warning on product card

indicator-gap.$description: U+25CF — filled circle = GAP status in list

indicator-plan.$description: U+25CB — outline circle = PLAN status in list

spacing.$description: 4px base grid — Tailwind CSS convention. Token name maps to Tailwind scale (space-[N] = N×4px)

4.$description: 16px — base unit, card padding, section inner

5.$description: 20px — body horizontal padding mobile, figure margin

10.$description: 40px — body padding desktop, layout column gap

border-radius.$description: Corner radius scale — editorial feel: subtle rounding, not overly rounded

sm.$description: Subtle round — TOC active state, zoom btn

full.$description: Pill/full round — status badges, tag chips

shadow.$description: Box shadows — light mode values. Dark mode: increase opacity (~3×)

sm.$description: Card default — most ve-card and surface elements

lg.$description: Large card hover, KPI card featured

dark-md.$description: Dark mode images and elevated surfaces

inset.$description: Inset — progress bar track, input well

motion.$description: Animation & transition — editorial pace, purposeful motion only

fast.$description: Micro interactions — hover state, toggle (most common)

fadeUp.$value: from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(12px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
fadeUp.$description: Card entrance animation — used with animation-delay: calc(--i × 60ms)

z-index.$description: Stacking context — keep flat where possible

overlay.$description: Theme toggle button, top-most persistent UI

layout.$description: Container sizes, grid, breakpoints — Next.js/Tailwind context

md.$description: Tailwind md — tablet, responsive H sizing

lg.$description: Tailwind lg — sidebar appears, desktop layout

column-gap.$description: Grid column gap between sidebar + main

margin-top-desktop.$description: scroll-margin-top for sidebar anchor nav — desktop

component.$description: Component-level composite tokens — map all primitives above to specific UI parts

height.$description: Sticky top navbar height (inferred from scroll-margin)

navbar.$description: Top navigation — sticky, chapter nav with dropdowns. Label format: '01 Tầm nhìn'

badge.$description: Status badges LIVE/DEV/PLAN/GAP + method tags BUILD/BUY/HYBRID. Always ALL-CAPS English.

kpi-card.$description: KPI stat cards — 3–4 column row. Value: large bold. Unit: inline. Label: muted below.

card.$description: Standard ve-card / platform card / product card

table.$description: All table types: risk register, RACI, roadmap, value stream matrix. Mobile: overflow-x: auto.

progress-bar.$description: Domain health bars trang /health. Color = {color.health.*} based on %

outline-sidebar.$description: Fixed left sidebar — Outline[N]. Shows Roman numeral sections as anchor links.

image.$description: sketch-img — full-width narrative images. Always lazy-loaded except hero.

timeline-bar.$description: Full-bleed horizontal bar 2026 ────── IPO 2030. Hero section + footer.

section-roman-numeral.$description: Decorative Roman numeral I, II, III — large, very faded. Not for navigation.

content.$description: Content conventions — không phải visual tokens, nhưng cần nhất quán cross-pages

$extensions.theme: Trải nghiệm KH cá nhân hoá
Vận hành số đo lường được

bilingual-rules.$description: Bất biến — KHÔNG được thay đổi convention này
bilingual-rules.vi-for-narrative: Tiếng Việt cho narrative, context, emotional copy, và section titles
bilingual-rules.en-for-technical: English cho: platform names, product names, acronyms, badge labels, squad names
bilingual-rules.code-switching-ok: Mixed Vi/EN trong cùng 1 sentence là bình thường: 'Platform tự xây in-house theo chuẩn industry'

$css-output.$description: Pre-generated CSS custom properties — copy trực tiếp vào :root { } và [data-theme='dark'] { }. Source of truth là JSON trên, đây là convenience output.
$css-output.usage: Paste vào globals.css hoặc Tailwind base layer. :root = light mode, [data-theme='dark'] / @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) = dark mode.
$css-output.light-mode: :root { --color-bg: #faf8f2; --color-surface: #ffffff; --color-surface-2: #f5f0e6; --color-surface-elevated: #fdfbf7; --color-border: rgba(30,30,50,0.08); --color-border-bright: rgba(30,30,50,0.14); --color-text: #1a1814; --color-text-dim: #7a7468; --color-text-bright: #0d0b08; --color-accent: #b8860b; --color-accent-dim: rgba(184,134,11,0.08); --color-green: #4d7c0f; --color-green-dim: rgba(77,124,15,0.08); --color-red: #b91c1c; --color-red-dim: rgba(185,28,28,0.08); --color-amber: #b45309; --color-amber-dim: rgba(180,83,9,0.08); --color-blue: #1e3a5f; --color-blue-dim: rgba(30,58,95,0.08); --color-plum: #7c2d12; --color-plum-dim: rgba(124,45,18,0.08); --font-body: 'Crimson Pro', Georgia, serif; --font-mono: 'Noto Sans Mono', 'SF Mono', Consolas, monospace; }
$css-output.dark-mode: [data-theme='dark'], @media(prefers-color-scheme:dark){:root:not([data-theme='light'])} { --color-bg: #0f1729; --color-surface: #162040; --color-surface-2: #1d2b52; --color-surface-elevated: #243560; --color-border: rgba(200,180,140,0.08); --color-border-bright: rgba(200,180,140,0.14); --color-text: #e8e4d8; --color-text-dim: #9a9484; --color-text-bright: #faf5f0; --color-accent: #d4a73a; --color-accent-dim: rgba(212,167,58,0.10); --color-green: #a3e635; --color-green-dim: rgba(163,230,53,0.10); --color-red: #fca5a5; --color-red-dim: rgba(252,165,165,0.10); --color-amber: #fbbf24; --color-amber-dim: rgba(251,191,36,0.10); --color-blue: #93c5fd; --color-blue-dim: rgba(96,165,250,0.10); --color-plum: #fda4af; --color-plum-dim: rgba(253,164,175,0.10); }
